content:
What are the Top Grants for AI and Digital Transformation?

{/* Scale AI */}
Scale AI - AI-Powered Supply Chains Supercluster
Up to $5M+
AI Supply Chain
Collaborative

Canada's AI Supercluster providing funding for projects applying AI to supply chains, logistics, manufacturing, and retail operations across industries.

AI Applications:
  • • Predictive analytics and forecasting
  • • Computer vision and quality control
  • • Natural language processing
  • • Autonomous systems and robotics
Funding Support:
  • • Up to 50% of eligible project costs
  • • Consortium partnerships required
  • • Scale-up and commercialization focus
  • • Skills development included
{/* CDAP */}
CDAP - Canada Digital Adoption Program
$15K + $100K Loan
Digital Tools
Quick Access

Support for SMEs adopting digital technologies including AI tools, cloud platforms, e-commerce systems, and digital marketing solutions.

Digital Solutions:
  • • AI-powered business tools
  • • Cloud computing platforms
  • • E-commerce and digital marketing
  • • CRM and business automation
Program Benefits:
  • • $15K grant for digital adoption plan
  • • Up to $100K interest-free loan
  • • Digital advisor support included
  • • Youth talent hiring support
{/* IRAP AI Projects */}
IRAP AI & Machine Learning Projects
Up to $500K
AI R&D
Non-Repayable

IRAP funding for SMEs developing AI/ML solutions, algorithms, and intelligent systems with commercial applications across industries.

AI Development Focus:
  • • Machine learning algorithms
  • • Computer vision applications
  • • Natural language processing
  • • Predictive analytics systems
Support Included:
  • • 60-80% of eligible R&D costs
  • • Industrial Technology Advisor
  • • Technical expertise access
  • • Commercialization support
{/* Pan-Canadian AI Strategy */}
Pan-Canadian AI Strategy Programs
$443M Investment
AI Research
Academic-Industry

Federal AI strategy supporting AI research institutes (Mila, Vector, Amii), talent development, and commercialization through industry partnerships.

AI Institutes:
  • • Mila (Montreal) - Deep learning
  • • Vector (Toronto) - Machine learning
  • • Amii (Edmonton) - Reinforcement learning
  • • Industry partnership programs
Support Areas:
  • • AI research collaborations
  • • Talent development programs
  • • Industry application projects
  • • Technology commercialization
shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Canadian digital and AI innovation grants. Access $850M+ funding through Scale AI, CDAP, AI research initiatives, and 25+ digital transformation programs. Funding available: up to $850M+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Canada Digital & AI Innovation Grants  | + Funding | Scale AI & CDAP in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Canada Digital & AI Innovation Grants  | + Funding | Scale AI & CDAP?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $850M.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Use CDAP for Strategy
expertTip.content: The Canada Digital Adoption Program (CDAP) pays for a consultant to write your digital plan. Use this plan to unlock the $100k interest-free BDC loan.
